ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Description of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store managed by the manager */,
  "manager_title" TEXT /* Title of the manager (e.g., Store Manager, Assistant Manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., purchase, return) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "items" TEXT /* List of items purchased in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store where the item is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the loyalty program */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the loyalty program expires */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to redeem a reward */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's loyalty program participation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Total points redeemed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign (e.g., increase sales, promote new product) */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the campaign (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment (e.g., new customers, loyal customers) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_participation" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Type of participation (e.g., opened email, clicked link) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer participated in the campaign */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response of the customer (e.g., made a purchase, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store where the staff member works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., cashier, sales associate) */,
  "staff_title" TEXT /* Title of the staff member (e.g., Store Manager, Assistant Manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
